faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Garden City South. Most yellow jacket nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. Our team serves all of Nassau County and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350–$550 yellow jacket removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe nest elimination using professional insecticides, removal of accessible nests, and a follow-up guarantee. The final cost depends on nest size, location difficulty (ground vs. aerial nests), and number of colonies. We provide free estimates for all Garden City South properties.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Garden City South during certain times of year?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket activity peaks in Garden City South from July through October when colonies are largest and most aggressive. During this period, they're attracted to outdoor dining areas, garbage bins, and sweet beverages. Early detection and removal in spring and early summer can prevent larger infestations later in the season.

faqs.question: Is yellow jacket removal safe for my family and pets in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional safety protocols to protect your family and pets during the removal process. We typically recommend staying indoors for 2-3 hours during treatment. Our technicians are fully licensed and insured, and we take extra precautions in residential areas to ensure complete safety for Garden City South families.
